The Departments Reference Catalog contains the Product Management Department as a core organizational unit within the bank's hierarchy.
The Product Management Department manages the Business Ontology, defining and maintaining product concepts and account types.
The Pricing Guide establishes the strategic rules and parameters that govern how the Interest Rate Schedule is calculated and applied.
The Product Management Department enforces the Account Opening SOP to ensure compliant and standardized customer onboarding processes.
The Product Management Department enforces the KYC Verification SOP to ensure strict customer identity and due diligence checks.
The Product Management Department enforces the AML Policy to mitigate financial crime risks and ensure regulatory compliance.
The Product Management Department enforces the Complaint Handling Policy to manage customer grievances and service recovery.
The Product Management Department enforces the Fraud Prevention and Detection Policy to safeguard bank assets and customer data.
